Defendant Warren Pumps, Inc.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One).
Off Calendar Jul-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Warren Pumps, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One) is moot as supplemental responses have been served. However, the court advises Plaintiff that the supplemental responses are inadequate and the court would not sustain the objections made to the interrogatory. The court finds that the initial responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $960, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Defendant Warren Pumps, Inc.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions (Set One),
Off Calendar Jul-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.Defendant Warren Pumps, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions is moot as supplemental responses have been served. However, the court advises Plaintiff that the objections would not be sustained as to Nos. 13-22, 24, and 27-36. Additionally, the responses are evasive and inadequate. It is not likely that the court would require a further responses to Nos. 25 and 26. The court finds that the initial responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,650, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
